summary: Phase 2 (Visibility Fix): Replaced all fill="var(--text-primary)" and stroke="var(--text-primary)" in MountainHiker.astro SVG with fill="var(--accent)" / stroke="var(--accent)" — hiker is now amber/gold (#c88a3e), visible on both dark hero and white mountain backgrounds.
Phase 2 (CSS): Added filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55)) to .hiker rule for legibility against both surfaces.

Phase 3 (Animation Fix): Updated will-change from 'transform' to 'translate, rotate'. Replaced @keyframes hiker-idle from transform: rotate() to the individual CSS rotate: property — CSS and JS transforms no longer conflict, preventing the snap-to-origin bug.

Phase 4 (Alignment + Smooth rAF Loop): Added HIKER_FOOT_Y = 32 constant. Fixed yOffset formula from -(MOUNTAIN_H - yPx) - HIKER_H (wrong) to -(MOUNTAIN_H - yPx) + (HIKER_H - HIKER_FOOT_Y) (correct — feet sit on ridge). Replaced direct scroll-to-position with a requestAnimationFrame lerp loop (LERP_FACTOR = 0.12). JS now uses element.style.translate instead of element.style.transform.
TypeScript Error Fix (Stats.astro:26,29): Added StatItem interface with optional noCount?: boolean field — resolves ts2339 on stat.noCount.
TypeScript Error Fix (BaseLayout.astro:452): Reassigned btn to waBtn after the null-guard if (!btn) return; — TypeScript narrows type correctly in the scroll event handler, resolving ts18047.

TypeScript Error Fix (404.astro:15): Removed unused t prop, Props interface, and unused imports. Corrected prop names from pageTitle/pageDescription/canonicalUrl to title/description/ogUrl matching BaseLayout.Props — resolves ts2322.
git_diff_stat: 4 source files changed (MountainHiker.astro ~85 lines, Stats.astro ~10 lines, BaseLayout.astro ~3 lines, 404.astro ~13 lines)
